mapper.sql: select banner_id, title, image_url, link_type, link_value, regions, start_time, end_time, sort_order, is_active from bh_banner
mapper.select: order by sort_order desc, banner_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into bh_banner ( title, image_url, link_type, link_value, regions, start_time, end_time, sort_order, is_active, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkType}, #{linkValue}, #{regions}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, now(), now() )
